children.text: to establish or conserve recurring Colorado River water that contributes to supplies in Lake Mead and other Colorado River water reservoirs in the Lower Colorado River Basin; or
to improve the long-term efficiency of operations in the Lower Colorado River Basin.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: b Limitation
children.text: None of the funds made available under may be used for the operation of the Yuma Desalting Plant.section 3201(8) of this title

children.heading: Effect
children.label: c Effect
children.text: Nothing in limits existing or future opportunities to augment the water supplies of the Colorado River.section 3201(8) of this title
